title: Southern Company raises quarterly dividend to 76 cents per share

title: Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) Investor Alert: Deadline in Lawsuit on April 20, 2026
summary: A deadline is approaching on April 20, 2026, for investors in Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) regarding a securities class-action lawsuit. title: Alaska Air Group reports first quarter 2026 results
summary: Alaska Air Group reported a GAAP net loss of $193 million, or $1.69 per share, for the first quarter of 2026, with an adjusted net loss of $192 million, or $1.68 per share. The results were significantly impacted by sharply higher fuel prices and localized demand disruptions in Hawaiʻi and Puerto Vallarta. Geraghty emphasized the airline's sufficient liquidity and access to additional capital, including a recently secured $500 million loan, while also acknowledging the structural disadvantages faced by smaller airlines.

title: JetBlue CEO rules out bankruptcy this year despite surging fuel costs amid Iran war
summary: JetBlue CEO Joanna Geraghty has assured employees that the airline is not considering bankruptcy this year, despite challenges posed by surging jet fuel costs due to the Iran war. This assurance comes after a viral video of JetBlue's founder raised bankruptcy concerns, highlighting the industry-wide pressure from increased fuel prices and the broader implications for consolidation, including Spirit Airlines' future.

title: No April payout as San Juan Basin (NYSE: SJT) faces excess costs
summary: San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (SJT) will not issue a cash distribution for April 2026 due to high excess production costs and low natural gas prices, which have eliminated royalty income. Distributions will remain suspended until cumulative excess production costs (currently $6.63 million gross), a $2 million reserve, and an $872,254 line of credit balance are fully repaid. The Trust is currently relying on debt and dwindling cash reserves to cover administrative expenses.

Both Daimler Truck and Toyota plan to retain approximately 25% ownership stakes in ARCHION, with the transaction generating cash inflow for Daimler Truck and supporting collaboration on future technologies.

Both proposals passed with a majority of votes, indicating strong shareholder support for the current leadership and auditor choice.

title: FutureFuel Corp. (NYSE: FF) schedules Q1 2026 earnings release for May 11
summary: FutureFuel Corp. (NYSE: FF) has announced that it will release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Monday, May 11, 2026. The announcement was made via an 8-K filing, and the earnings release will be accessible on the Investor Relations section of the company's website. FutureFuel Corp. operates as a manufacturer of diversified chemical products and biofuels.

title: [10-K/A] READING INTERNATIONAL INC Amends Annual Report
summary: Reading International, Inc. (RDI) has filed an amended annual report (Form 10-K/A) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This amendment primarily updates the exhibit index, adds Exhibit 97.1 (Executive Officer Clawback Policy), and includes revised officer certifications. The filing notes that no financial statements or other substantive disclosures were changed in this amendment.

title: OCS Reiterated by HC Wainwright & Co. -- Price Target Maintained at $44
summary: HC Wainwright & Co. has reiterated its 'Buy' rating for Oculis Holding (OCS), maintaining a price target of $44.00, suggesting a significant upside from its current price of $29.00. While the company demonstrates strong financial strength with a recent market cap of $1.68 billion, its GF Score™ of 40/100 highlights concerns regarding profitability. Despite this, the consistent analyst confidence and solid pipeline of eye care solutions position Oculis for potential future growth.

title: GOSS Stockholders Have Rights – If You Lost Money Investing
summary: Robbins LLP is reminding stockholders of Gossamer Bio, Inc. (GOSS) about a class action lawsuit filed against the company. The lawsuit alleges that Gossamer Bio misled investors regarding the viability of its Phase 3 PROSERA study, which failed to meet its primary endpoint, leading to an over 80% stock price drop. Shareholders who invested between June 16, 2025, and February 20, 2026, may be eligible to participate and have until June 1, 2026, to submit lead plaintiff papers.

title: Radware investors to vote on CEO pay, directors at May 25 meeting
summary: Radware (NASDAQ: RDWR) announced its 2026 Annual General Meeting will be held on May 25, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of three Class III directors, approval of equity awards and annual bonus structure changes for the CEO, and reappointment of auditors. The record date for the meeting is April 21, 2026, and the company will also present its 2025 financial statements. Special voting conditions apply, particularly for the CEO compensation proposal, as per Israeli Companies Law.

title: FreightCar America sets May 5 call after Q1 2026 results on May 4
summary: FreightCar America (NASDAQ: RAIL) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 4, 2026, after the market closes. The company will then host a teleconference on May 5, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Investors can access the call via dial-in numbers or a listen-only webcast, with replay details also provided.

title: Radware (NASDAQ: RDWR) details CEO equity awards and 2026 AGM agenda
summary: Radware (NASDAQ: RDWR) announced details for its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for May 25, 2026. Key agenda items include the re-election of three Class III directors, approval of changes to CEO Roy Zisapel's compensation plan, and the re-appointment of Ernst & Young's Israeli affiliate as auditor. The CEO's revised compensation involves a new annual bonus structure with a focus on Annual Recurring Revenue and Cloud ARR, and performance-based equity awards valued at $6.0 million annually for 2026-2028, tied partly to relative total shareholder return.

title: IonQ Inc Options Spot-On: On April 20th, 149.58K Contracts Were Traded, With 837.38K Open Interest
summary: This article analyzes the options trading activity for IonQ Inc (IONQ) on April 20th, noting significant volume with 149.58K contracts traded against an open interest of 837.38K. It highlights the put-call ratio of 0.69, indicating slightly more call activity, and identifies key strike prices and expiration dates for both calls and puts that saw notable trading. The analysis also touches on the concept of implied volatility.

title: Marc Maurer reports multiple ONON Class A share sales, including 100,000 (ONON)
summary: Marc Maurer has reported multiple sales of Class A Ordinary Shares in On Holding AG (ONON) via a Form 144/A SEC filing. The sales occurred between January 12, 2026, and March 6, 2026, and included repeated transactions of 6,250 shares, with a significant sale of 100,000 shares on March 5, 2026, and 14,062 shares on March 6, 2026. The filing indicates the shares were originally acquired from the issuer in a private transaction on December 21, 2017.

title: Divorce settlement shifts 14,523 Farmer Brothers (FARM) shares
summary: Farmer Brothers Co. director Terence C. O’Brien transferred 14,523 shares of common stock to his former spouse as part of a divorce settlement. This non-market transaction was disclosed in a Form 4 insider report, leaving O'Brien with 35,571 shares directly owned. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding the transaction.

title: QVC Group Faces Nasdaq Delisting After Chapter 11 Filing
summary: QVC Group, Inc. and its affiliates filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on April 16, 2026, leading to Nasdaq's decision to delist its Series A common stock and preferred stock, effective April 24, 2026. The company will not appeal the delisting, and its capital stock is expected to move to OTC Markets, though liquidity is not guaranteed. Existing equity holders are anticipated to receive no recovery, with their shares cancelled under the prepackaged Chapter 11 plan.

title: QVC (QVCC) notes face NYSE delisting as Chapter 11 plan cancels debt and equity
summary: QVC, Inc. (QVCC) has announced that its 6.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2067 (QVCD) and 6.250% Senior Secured Notes due 2068 (QVCC) will be delisted from the NYSE following its Chapter 11 filing. Trading has been suspended, and QVC does not plan to appeal this decision, stating it won't impact ongoing operations or bankruptcy proceedings. Under the prepackaged Chapter 11 plan, these notes will be cancelled with holders receiving plan distributions, while equity interests in QVC Group are expected to be cancelled with no recovery.

title: Corporación América Airports Sets May 13, 2026 AGM, Proposes Profit Allocation and Board Renewals
summary: Corporación América Airports S.A. will hold its Annual General Meeting (AGM) on May 13, 2026, in Luxembourg. The company proposes allocating 5% of its US$103.96 million profit for 2025 to legal reserves and carrying forward the remaining earnings, signaling a conservative profit-retention policy. Additionally, shareholders will vote on renewing director mandates through the 2029 meeting.

title: CNB Financial reports Q1 2026: $26.0M net income, $0.88 diluted EPS, $7.14B deposits
summary: CNB Financial reported a net income of $25.96 million ($0.88 diluted EPS) for Q1 2026, with total revenue reaching $83.3 million and total deposits at $7.14 billion. The company observed organic deposit growth and modest loan declines due to commercial real estate prepayments, alongside a tangible book value per share of $23.97.

title: CNB Financial (CCNE) shares 2026 annual meeting investor presentation
summary: CNB Financial Corporation (CCNE) furnished an investor presentation for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, detailing its strategy, financial performance, deposit and loan composition, and asset quality. The presentation, available as an 8-K filing and on the company's website, includes extensive use of non-GAAP financial measures with reconciliations and cautionary language regarding forward-looking statements. Key highlights cover the impact of the ESSA Bancorp acquisition, capital position, and recent quarterly trends in earnings, growth, net interest margin, and efficiency.

title: CNB Financial (NASDAQ: CCNE) Q1 2026 EPS hits $0.88 with 3.84% margin
summary: CNB Financial (NASDAQ: CCNE) announced Q1 2026 earnings, reporting net income available to common shareholders of $25.9 million, or $0.88 per diluted share. This performance reflects the impact of the ESSA Bancorp acquisition and reduced merger-related costs. The company achieved a stable fully tax-equivalent net interest margin of 3.84% and maintained solid credit quality with net charge-offs at 0.06% of average loans.

title: D-Wave Quantum Inc. SEC Filing
summary: This SEC Form 144 filing by D-Wave Quantum Inc. (QBTS) details a proposed sale of 3,070 shares of common stock stemming from an RSU vesting event on March 18, 2026. The transaction is set to occur on April 20, 2026, through J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, with these shares being part of the company's compensation plan. The filing explicitly states that no material adverse information regarding the issuer's operations is known to the seller that has not been publicly disclosed.

title: Equity at QVC Group (QVCGA) Faces Nasdaq Delisting and Expected Wipeout
summary: QVC Group, Inc. (QVCGA) is set to be delisted from Nasdaq on April 24, 2026, following its voluntary Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing, with the company stating it will not appeal the decision. Equity holders of Series A and B common stock and 8.0% preferred stock are expected to receive no distributions and have their interests canceled for no consideration under the prepackaged Chapter 11 plan. While trading may move to an OTC Markets Group venue, the company warns that such trading is highly speculative and poses substantial risks of complete wipeout for existing shareholders.

title: QVC Group to be delisted from Nasdaq following bankruptcy filing
summary: QVC Group announced its Series A common stock and 8.0% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock will be delisted from Nasdaq and trading suspended due to its recent voluntary Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing. The company's stock has plunged significantly, and current shareholders are not expected to receive distributions. QVC Group intends for its capital stock to trade on OTC Markets Group, though it cannot guarantee this.

title: Asana (NYSE: ASAN) sets 2026 meeting, board changes and say-on-pay vote
summary: Asana, Inc. (NYSE: ASAN) has scheduled its 2026 annual shareholder meeting for June 8, 2026, where stockholders will vote on electing three Class III directors, ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the auditor, and an advisory "say-on-pay" proposal for executive compensation. The company also announced Board changes, with three long-tenured directors departing, reducing the Board size from ten to seven, and Krista Anderson-Copperman succeeding Lorrie Norrington as Lead Independent Director. Additionally, the proxy statement details executive compensation, including new CEO Dan Rogers's package and the introduction of annual bonuses and Performance Stock Units (PSUs) as a greater focus for executive compensation.

title: Granite Point (NYSE: GPMT) revises executive pay after 69% say-on-pay support
summary: Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc. (NYSE: GPMT) has revised its executive compensation program following investor feedback after its 2025 "say-on-pay" proposal received only 69% support. The changes for 2026 include eliminating off-cycle time-based equity grants, reducing equity award values, and redesigning performance stock units to vest based on relative total shareholder return and absolute share price targets to better align with long-term shareholder interests. The company will hold its 2026 annual meeting virtually on June 4, 2026, where shareholders will vote on director elections, executive compensation, and auditor ratification.

title: Prologis files for two part notes offering of $1.25 billion
summary: Prologis has filed for a two-part notes offering totaling $1.25 billion. This announcement follows an earlier disclosure that ProLogis LP also filed for an offering of CAD denominated notes, though the size of that offering was not specified.

title: [Form 4] Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
summary: Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. Director Robert Kent Grahl recently reported an acquisition of 3,734 restricted stock units (RSUs) in a Form 4 filing. These RSUs, valued at $46.86 per share, will vest prior to the company's 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Following this grant, Grahl holds 31,101 shares of Tri Pointe Homes common stock.

title: CVRx (CVRX) details 2026 virtual meeting, board nominees and pay
summary: CVRx, Inc. will hold its 2026 annual shareholder meeting virtually on June 1, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of three Class II directors, including CEO Kevin Hykes and new nominee Michael Dale, and the ratification of Grant Thornton as the independent auditor. The company is set to lose its "emerging growth company" status by December 31, 2026, which will lead to increased reporting requirements. The proxy statement also details executive and director compensation, with CEO Kevin Hykes' total compensation for 2025 reported as over $3.9 million, and outlines the significant ownership stakes of major stockholders like Johnson & Johnson.

title: Former Abbott structural heart leader Michael Dale lands CVRx board nomination
summary: CVRx, Inc. (NASDAQ: CVRX) announced the nomination of Michael Dale to its Board of Directors, with the election scheduled for June 1, 2026. Dale, currently CEO of Axogen and former head of Abbott's structural heart division for eight years, is expected to bring extensive commercial and leadership experience to drive Barostim adoption. His nomination is seen as a strategic move to leverage his expertise in the medical device industry for the company's growth.

title: AN2 Therapeutics (NASDAQ: ANTX) files $80M at‑the‑market offering
summary: AN2 Therapeutics (NASDAQ: ANTX) has launched an at-the-market (ATM) offering to sell up to $80 million of its common stock through Jefferies LLC. The company plans to use the net proceeds primarily for research and development, working capital, and general corporate purposes. This ATM program is part of AN2's existing $300 million shelf registration and may result in dilution for existing shareholders.

title: AN2 Therapeutics, Inc. has entered into an at-the-market offering sales agreement with Jefferies LLC.
summary: AN2 Therapeutics, Inc. has signed an at-the-market offering sales agreement with Jefferies LLC to flexibly raise funds by selling common stock shares in the open market. This move allows the biopharmaceutical company to secure funding for business development and continued R&D investments, which typically require significant capital due to long development cycles. The agreement, signed on April 9, 2026, was officially filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

title: InspireMD (NSPR) schedules 2026 shareholder meeting on director slate and share authorization
summary: InspireMD (NSPR) announced its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders for June 3, 2026, where shareholders will vote on re-electing three Class 3 directors, increasing authorized common shares from 150 million to 250 million, and ratifying Kesselman & Kesselman as the independent auditor. The company's board of directors recommends voting "FOR" all proposals. Holders of record as of April 10, 2026, will be eligible to vote.

title: Frankenius Equity swaps preferred for 759,000 TriSalus (TLSI) common shares
summary: Frankenius Equity AB, a significant holder of TriSalus Life Sciences, Inc. (TLSI), converted all its Series A Convertible Preferred Stock into 759,000 common shares on July 31, 2025. This conversion was part of a company exchange offer, utilizing a formula based on liquidation preference and a $4.00 conversion price. Following this transaction, Frankenius Equity AB now directly holds 6,989,748 TriSalus common shares.

title: Inhibikase Therapeutics (IKT) asks shareholders to add 3M plan shares
summary: Inhibikase Therapeutics is seeking shareholder approval to increase its 2020 Equity Incentive Plan by 3,000,000 shares to ensure sufficient equity for compensation and retention. The company will hold a virtual 2026 Annual Meeting on June 26, 2026, where shareholders will also vote on electing two directors, ratifying CohnReznick as auditor, and approving an officer exculpation amendment to its charter. The Board recommends voting "FOR" all proposals, including an advisory "one year" frequency for executive compensation votes.

title: Argan (AGX) Gemma CEO gains 13,166 shares from RSU vesting
summary: Charles Edwin Collins IV, CEO of Gemma (a subsidiary of Argan Inc. - AGX), acquired 13,166 shares of common stock through the vesting and exercise of various restricted stock units (RSUs) and performance-based units. These transactions, occurring on April 16-17, 2026, increased his direct holdings to 30,320 shares. The RSUs included Renewable Performance-Based, Time-Based, and Earnings Per Share Performance-Based units, with some awards exceeding their target share levels.

title: Argan (AGX) CEO Watson sells 19,310 shares as performance RSUs vest above target
summary: Argan's CEO, David Hibbert Watson, sold 19,310 shares of common stock for $602.11 per share following the vesting of multiple equity awards, including performance-based and time-based restricted stock units. The performance-based RSUs vested above their target levels, indicating strong company performance. After the sale, Watson directly holds 49,998 shares.

title: Director at Argan (AGX) gains 700 common shares through TRSU vesting
summary: Argan director Lisa Larroque Alexander acquired 700 common shares through the vesting of 695 Time-Based Restricted Stock Units (TRSUs) on April 16, 2026. This transaction reflects routine equity compensation based on a one-year vesting schedule for TRSUs granted on April 16, 2025. Following this, she directly holds 700 common shares and 530 TRSUs.

title: [PRE 14C] CIMG Inc. Preliminary Information Statement
summary: CIMG Inc. filed a Preliminary Information Statement (PRE 14C) detailing several corporate actions approved by majority stockholders on April 14, 2026. These actions include authorizing the issuance of up to 32 million shares for convertible notes and warrants, nearly 74.5 million performance shares for an acquisition, increasing authorized common shares from 2 billion to 5 billion, amending the 2026 Equity Incentive Plan to fix a 38 million share reserve, and allowing for board-discretionary reverse stock splits ranging from 1-for-2 to 1-for-300. Additionally, the company approved a securities purchase agreement to sell up to $3.4 million in stock, potentially issuing up to 340 million shares, which could lead to significant dilution for existing shareholders.

title: Wintrust Financial beats Q1 estimates, but shares dip slightly
summary: Wintrust Financial Corporation exceeded analyst expectations for its first quarter 2026 earnings, reporting adjusted EPS of $3.22 against an estimated $2.96, and revenue of $713.2 million. Despite strong performance including 11% year-over-year revenue growth and a 20% increase in net income, the company's shares experienced a slight dip of 0.3% in after-hours trading. The company also highlighted solid balance sheet growth with increases in both loans and deposits, and an improved net interest margin.

title: [8-K] WESTLAKE CORP Reports Material Event
summary: Westlake Corporation (NYSE: WLK) has appointed Jonathan H. Baksht as its new Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective June 15, 2026. He will succeed M. Steven Bender, who will transition to a Special Advisor role before retiring by year-end. Baksht's compensation includes a significant sign-on cash award, restricted stock units, and a competitive base salary, reflecting his extensive prior CFO experience across several industries.

title: TFI International (TFII) schedules 2026 shareholder meeting and proxy voting details
summary: TFI International Inc. (TFII) has announced it will hold its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. EDT. Shareholders are encouraged to vote in advance by returning their proxy form, voting instruction form, online, or via a toll-free number, with a deadline of 5:00 p.m. EDT on Thursday, April 23, 2026. In-person attendance is limited to registered shareholders and appointed proxyholders, while others can participate by telephone to ask questions but not vote.

title: Qiagen N.V. stock (NL0012169213): Why does its molecular diagnostics edge matter more for U.S. investors now?
summary: The article highlights Qiagen N.V.'s strategic position in the molecular diagnostics market, emphasizing its "sample-to-insight" technology as a stable investment opportunity for U.S. and English-speaking investors. It details how Qiagen's focus on enabling technologies, rather than direct drug development, provides exposure to booming biotech demand with lower volatility and reduced R&D risks. The company's core business model, key growth drivers, competitive advantage, and relevance for international investors are discussed, alongside potential risks and analyst views.

title: Shuttle Pharma (SHPH) proxy asks investors to OK major reverse split range
summary: Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (SHPH) is asking stockholders to approve a broad range for reverse stock splits, from 1-for-2 to 1-for-150, at its discretion to maintain Nasdaq listing compliance. The proxy also covers the election of five directors, ratification of Forvis Mazars, LLP as auditor, and an advisory vote on executive compensation for its upcoming May 21, 2026, annual meeting. The company emphasizes the necessity of this flexibility due to market volatility and past listing challenges, despite potential for future dilution.

title: Magnite CFO David Day to retire after decade in role By Investing.com
summary: Magnite's CFO, David Day, is set to retire after ten years in the role, continuing as CFO until September 30, 2026, and then serving as a special advisor. The company has initiated a search for his replacement while reaffirming its financial expectations for Q1 and full-year 2026. Day's tenure included overseeing significant mergers and acquisitions, contributing to the company's profitability and growth in the sell-side advertising platform sector.

title: Herzfeld (HERZ) discloses 772,965-share, 37.6% holding in Credit Income Fund
summary: Erik M. Herzfeld has reported a beneficial ownership of 772,965 shares, representing 37.57% of Herzfeld Credit Income Fund, Inc. (HERZ), according to a recent SCHEDULE 13D/A filing. This includes shares with sole voting power and those held in advisory client accounts with shared voting and dispositive power. Recent activity shows advisory clients made net purchases of HERZ shares in March and April 2026, including a notable buy of 13,573 shares at $16.527 on April 16, 2026.

title: Superior Group of Companies to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Superior Group of Companies (NASDAQ: SGC) announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Monday, May 4, 2026. Company executives will host a teleconference and webcast at 8:00 AM Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results and provide additional insights. A replay of the teleconference will be available through May 11, 2026.

title: Tivic Health director Sheryle Bolton buys $10,400 in common stock
summary: Tivic Health director Sheryle Bolton acquired 10,000 shares of common stock for $10,400, bringing her total direct ownership to 10,000 shares. This purchase follows a 38% stock surge in the past week, although it's still down 56% over six months. The company is actively transitioning to biopharmaceutical operations, focusing on its TLR5 immunotherapy platform.

title: Tivic Health (TIVC) asks shareholders to OK 2.58M plan shares, Series C and $50M equity line
summary: Tivic Health (TIVC) is seeking shareholder approval for several financial and governance actions at its 2026 Annual Meeting. Key proposals include increasing the 2021 Equity Incentive Plan shares by 2.58 million, ratifying its auditor, and approving future issuances related to Series C Preferred financing, a Note Purchase with 3i, LP, and a $50 million Equity Line of Credit. The Board unanimously recommends voting "FOR" all proposals, emphasizing these moves are crucial for attracting and retaining talent, funding business growth, and maintaining financial flexibility.

title: Armlogi Holding Disclosed Failure to Satisfy a Continued Listing Rule or Standard
summary: Armlogi Holding (BTOC) received a Nasdaq notice on April 17, 2026, for failing to meet the continued listing rule requiring a Market Value of Publicly Held Shares (MVPHS) of at least $5,000,000. The company has 180 days, until October 14, 2026, to regain compliance by maintaining the required MVPHS for 10 consecutive business days. Failure to do so could result in delisting, though the company has options to appeal or transfer to another Nasdaq market.

title: Nasdaq flags Armlogi (BTOC) for sub-$5M public float, sets 180-day cure
summary: Armlogi Holding Corp. (BTOC) has received a notice from Nasdaq stating that its common stock no longer meets the Nasdaq Global Market's continued listing standards because its Market Value of Publicly Held Shares (MVPHS) was below $5 million for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 calendar days, until October 14, 2026, to regain compliance by having its MVPHS close at or above $5 million for at least ten consecutive business days. Failure to comply could lead to delisting, though Armlogi may appeal or transfer its listing to the Nasdaq Capital Market.

title: SEZZLE INVESTOR ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is Investigating Sezzle, Inc. on Behalf of Sezzle Stockholders and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is investigating potential claims against Sezzle, Inc. (NASDAQ: SEZL) after a board member, Karen Webster, resigned due to a "growing difference in perspective with management concerning the Company's direction, key decisions, and governance." This news led to a 13.61% drop in Sezzle's stock price on April 10, 2026. The law firm is encouraging Sezzle stockholders who suffered losses to contact them to discuss their legal options.

title: Invesco BulletShares 2030 Municipal Bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0512
summary: The Invesco BulletShares 2030 Municipal Bond ETF (BSMU) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0512 per share. This information was released to investors.

title: Westlake turns to ex-Fortune Brands finance chief for CFO role
summary: Westlake Chemical Partners LP (NYSE: WLKP) announced that Jonathan H. Baksht will join as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, and as a director of its general partner, effective June 15, 2026. He succeeds M. Steven Bender, who will transition to a Special Advisor role ahead of his retirement. Baksht brings extensive experience from his previous CFO roles at Fortune Brands Innovations, Pactiv Evergreen, and Valaris Limited.

title: BANK OF MONTREAL /CAN/ Prospectus Supplement
summary: Bank of Montreal has priced US$861,000 Senior Medium-Term Notes, Series K, which are Autocallable Barrier Notes linked to Bank of America Corporation common stock. These notes offer contingent quarterly coupons of 3.25% (approximately 13.00% per annum) if BAC's stock closes at or above the Coupon Barrier on Observation Dates. The notes mature on April 4, 2029, with principal subject to loss if BAC's Final Level is below the Trigger Level.

title: Westrock Coffee Adds Investor-Backed Director, Trims Board Size
summary: Westrock Coffee recently appointed A. Wellford Tabor to its Board of Directors and Audit & Finance Committee, while also reducing the board's overall size by one seat. Tabor's appointment reinforces investor influence, as he is a designee of a major shareholder group holding over 10% of Westrock's stock and convertible notes. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates WEST as Neutral due to weak financial performance, though it notes upbeat FY26 EBITDA and free-cash-flow timing from reduced CapEx.

title: New CFO Jonathan Baksht joins Westlake Chemical Partners (WLKP) in June 2026
summary: Westlake Chemical Partners (WLKP) has appointed Jonathan H. Baksht as its new Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective June 15, 2026. This move is part of a planned leadership transition as current CFO M. Steven Bender will retire by year-end, moving into a Special Advisor role temporarily. Baksht brings extensive financial leadership experience from previous CFO roles at Fortune Brands Innovations, Pactiv Evergreen Inc., and Valaris Limited.

title: Tabor joins Westrock Coffee (NASDAQ: WEST) board and audit committee
summary: Westrock Coffee Company has appointed A. Wellford Tabor to its Board of Directors and Audit & Finance Committee, effective immediately. Tabor fills a Class II seat until the 2027 annual meeting, succeeding a retiring director, and his appointment aligns with an existing Investor Rights Agreement that allows the RVAC Majority to designate directors. As a non-employee director, Tabor will be compensated under Westrock’s standard program and holds significant convertible senior notes in the company.

title: [144] ETSY INC SEC Filing
summary: This SEC filing (Form 144) for Etsy Inc (ETSY) details a proposed sale of common stock resulting from an issuer-side exercise of stock options for 30,369 shares to be sold for cash on April 20, 2026. The filing also reports multiple open-market dispositions by Josh Silverman totaling 64,184 shares over the prior three months. This is described as a routine resale/notice filing, primarily recording option exercises and recent insider sales for compliance purposes.

title: BOK Financial’s (NASDAQ:BOKF) Q1 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: BOK Financial (NASDAQ:BOKF) reported Q1 CY2026 earnings, with revenue of $553.8 million, up 9.7% year-on-year, meeting analyst expectations. While GAAP EPS of $2.58 surpassed estimates by 12.7%, net interest income and tangible book value per share slightly missed projections. The stock remained flat immediately after the earnings release.

title: NTST: Record Q1 investment activity and higher AFFO drive raised 2026 guidance and strong liquidity
summary: NetSTREIT Corp. (NTST) reported strong Q1 2026 results, including growth in net income and AFFO per share, record investment activity, and a strengthened balance sheet. The company raised its guidance for AFFO and net investment, citing robust liquidity and occupancy. This information is based on their SEC 8-K Current Report.

title: NUAI Stockholders Have Rights – If You Lost Money Investing
summary: Robbins LLP is reminding stockholders of New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUAI) that a class action lawsuit has been filed on behalf of investors who purchased securities between November 6, 2024, and December 29, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that New Era Energy & Digital misled investors regarding its Texas Critical Data Centers project, engaged in fraudulent schemes concerning oil and gas wells, and made false statements about its financial results and business prospects, leading to harm for investors when the truth was revealed. Shareholders have until June 1, 2026, to submit papers to the court to serve as lead plaintiff.

title: Earnings Flash (NTST) NETSTREIT Corp. Reports Q1 Revenue $57.1M, vs. FactSet Est of $50.8M
summary: NETSTREIT Corp. (NTST) reported strong first-quarter revenue of $57.1 million, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $50.8 million. The company's Q1 Adjusted Funds From Operations (AFFO) also reached $0.34, matching FactSet's estimate. This positive financial performance indicates solid operational results for the real estate company.

title: [8-K] NETSTREIT Corp. Reports Material Event
summary: NETSTREIT Corp. reported strong first-quarter 2026 growth, with net income rising to $0.06 per diluted share and AFFO increasing to $0.34 per diluted share, driven by a revenue increase to $57.1 million. The company completed $239.0 million in gross investment activity and raised its full-year 2026 AFFO per share guidance to $1.36–$1.39 and net investment activity guidance to $550–$650 million. NETSTREIT maintains a robust balance sheet with approximately $1.13 billion in liquidity and a low pro forma adjusted net debt to annualized adjusted EBITDAre of 3.2x.

title: Laboratory teams drive progress in skin cancer diagnostics at Castle Biosciences
summary: Castle Biosciences is celebrating its laboratory professionals during Lab Week, acknowledging their vital contributions to innovative diagnostic tests for skin cancer. The company highlights its lab teams' role in providing personalized information that enhances patient care and improves health outcomes. This recognition coincides with Castle Biosciences unveiling its new headquarters in Friendswood, Texas, underscoring its commitment to growth and community.

title: Contango Ore Merger With Dolly Varden Approved: Combined Cash Tops US$112M
summary: Contango Ore shareholders have approved the merger with Dolly Varden Silver, creating a diversified North American precious metals platform with over US$112 million in cash and US$34 million in debt. Following this approval, ATB Cormark Capital Markets analyst Richard Gray maintained an Outperform rating for Contango Ore (now Contango Silver & Gold Inc.), raising the price target to US$50.00 from US$46.00, implying a potential 155% return. A cash dividend of $0.36 per share was declared for common stock, payable on May 29, 2026. The company also declared a Series C preferred stock dividend of $0.6171875 per share, payable on May 15, 2026.

title: [144] WESTAMERICA BANCORPORATION SEC Filing
summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Westamerica Bancorporation (WABC), indicating a notice of proposed sale of securities. The document provides information about the filer, issuer, securities to be sold, and the acquisition details, specifically mentioning RSU/PSU common stock acquired on March 2, 2026, for equity compensation. The filing also notes that no securities were sold during the past three months by the person for whose account the securities are to be sold.

title: EOSE Investor Alert: EOS Energy Enterprises, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misleading Institutional Shareholders: Levi & Korsinsky
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has announced an investor alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against EOS Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOSE). The lawsuit alleges that institutional investors were misled by misrepresentations about the company's manufacturing capacity and production readiness, causing a significant stock price drop. Investors who held EOSE shares between November 5, 2025, and February 26, 2026, are encouraged to evaluate lead plaintiff opportunities to recover losses.

title: Veris Residential Investor Alert: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Veris Residential, Inc. - VRE
summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE: VRE) to an investor consortium for $19.00 per share in cash. The law firm aims to determine if the consideration and the sale process are adequate or if the company is undervalued. Shareholders are invited to contact KSF to discuss their legal rights if they believe the transaction undervalues the company.

title: VNET (Nasdaq: VNET) CFO Qiyu Wang to step down, finance role shifts
summary: VNET Group, Inc. announced that CFO Qiyu Wang will resign for personal reasons, effective April 30, 2026, assuring that his departure is not related to any operational or accounting disagreements. The company highlighted that Peter Zhihua Zhang was appointed Senior Vice President, Operational Finance and principal accounting officer in February 2026, providing continuity in financial oversight. VNET is a leading carrier- and cloud-neutral internet data center services provider in China, serving over 7,000 enterprise customers.

title: PMGC Holdings (ELAB) registers $7.79M of stock tied to $40M ELOC with Streeterville
summary: PMGC Holdings Inc. has registered $7.79 million in common stock for issuance and resale in connection with a $40 million equity purchase facility (ELOC) with Streeterville Capital, LLC. The registration covers 262,467 shares delivered for $1 million and an additional $6.79 million in Pre-Paid Purchase Shares. The company received net proceeds of approximately $9.73 million and noted management's continuing concern about its ability to operate.

title: Insider 10b5-1 sales reported at HRTG (NASDAQ: HRTG) with multiple dispositions
summary: Heritage Insurance Holdings (NASDAQ: HRTG) has reported multiple insider sales under a Rule 10b5-1 plan. The SEC Form 144 filing indicates that sales of Restricted Stock Units converted to common stock were executed on February 20, 2026, and March 20, 2026, with reported proceeds of $180,122.71 and $189,568.46, respectively. These transactions were made by Ernesto J. Garateix and by Ernesto Garateix & Yvette Garateix.

title: HRTG (NYSE: HRTG) insiders report multiple 10b5-1 Rule 144 sales
summary: A recent SEC Form 144 filing indicates that insiders associated with Ernesto J. Garateix and Ernesto Garateix & Yvette Garateix have reported multiple 10b5-1 Rule 144 sales of Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. (HRTG) common stock. These programmed sales occurred on February 20, 2026, and March 20, 2026, involving transactions of 7,467 and 867 shares, with total proceeds exceeding $412,000 across the reported dates. The filing details the number of shares sold and the corresponding proceeds, clarifying that these were pre-scheduled 10b5-1 sales.

title: Travelzoo Shareholders Back Leadership, Governance and Pay Plans
summary: Travelzoo shareholders have approved a significant stock option grant for CEO Holger Bartel and ratified the board slate and executive pay plans at their 2026 annual meeting. This outcome indicates strong investor support for the company's leadership and compensation strategies. Despite some balance sheet weaknesses and profit fluctuations highlighted by TipRanks’ AI Analyst, the vote reflects confidence in the company's direction.

title: May 6 before the bell: Strata Critical to post Q1 results, hold call
summary: Strata Critical Medical (Nasdaq: SRTA) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 8:00 AM ET to discuss the results and answer questions, led by Co-CEOs Melissa Tomkiel and Will Heyburn. Historically, similar earnings call announcements have been followed by a slight negative one-day price movement for SRTA stock.

title: COTY Investor Alert: Coty Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Company Allegedly Misled on Growth Timeline: Levi & Korsinsky
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP encourages investors of Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) who suffered losses to contact the firm, particularly those who purchased securities between November 5, 2025, and February 4, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Coty misled investors with positive growth guidance that was later contradicted by disappointing financial results, leading to a significant stock price decline. Investors can apply for lead plaintiff status until May 22, 2026.

title: Ninety One SA Ltd. acquired an unknown minority stake in Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited.
summary: Ninety One SA (Pty) Ltd. acquired a minority stake in Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited on April 20, 2026. Following this acquisition, Ninety One's total interest in Harmony Gold Mining Company's ordinary shares amounts to 5.2017% of the total issued shares. The stake's value was not disclosed.

title: [S-1] Amesite Inc. Files IPO Registration Statement
summary: Amesite Inc. has filed an S-1 IPO registration statement to offer 2,777,778 shares of common stock with accompanying warrants at an assumed combined price of $1.80 per share, aiming to raise approximately $4.47 million for working capital and general corporate purposes. The filing highlights significant risks, including recurring net losses, substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern, and the risk of Nasdaq delisting due to unmet stockholders' equity requirements. The company emphasizes its pivot to AI-powered solutions for the healthcare sector under its NurseMagic™ brand, targeting both B2C and B2B markets, while acknowledging intense competition and regulatory challenges.

title: Dart-linked entity boosts Flutter (FLUT) exposure with large swap
summary: Kenneth Bryan Dart's entity, Lake Michigan Limited, has increased its exposure to Flutter Entertainment plc (FLUT) through a new Total Return Swap referencing 948,508 shares at $108.4698 per share, set to terminate on March 2, 2028. This cash-settled swap provides economic exposure to Flutter's share price movements and dividends without actual share ownership. Following this transaction, Dart's indirect position reflects exposure on 11,916,212 referenced shares, with another related entity, LBS Limited, holding swaps on an additional 7,453,418 notional shares.

title: Fortis Inc stock (CA32076V1031): Is its regulated utility model strong enough to deliver reliable U.
summary: Fortis Inc. (CA32076V1031) is presented as a stable investment due to its regulated utility model across North America, offering reliable dividends and exposure to essential infrastructure. The company's strategy focuses on rate-base expansion, grid modernization, and sustainability, aligning with global electrification trends and providing defensive growth in volatile markets. Investors should monitor regulatory risks, interest rate sensitivities, and capital expenditure execution, but the long-term outlook appears positive for diversified portfolios.

title: Invesco Senior Loan ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.1049
summary: The Invesco Senior Loan ETF (BKLN) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.1049 per share. This financial announcement is relevant for investors holding or considering investments in this ETF.

title: Magnite starts CFO search as finance chief stays through Sept. 30
summary: Magnite (Nasdaq: MGNI) announced that CFO David Day will retire on September 30, 2026, but will continue as a special advisor through May 31, 2027, to facilitate a smooth transition during the search for his successor. The company stated that it will consider both internal and external candidates for the CFO position and reaffirmed its financial expectations for Q1 and the full year 2026. Day's tenure included significant corporate transformations, such as the Rubicon Project–Telaria merger and the acquisitions of SpotX and SpringServe.

title: RxSight (RXST) COO exercises stock options, now holding over 79,000 shares
summary: RxSight, Inc. Chief Operating Officer Ilya Goldshleger exercised stock options to acquire 12,489 shares of common stock at $4.13 per share. Following this transaction, Goldshleger now directly holds 78,180 shares and indirectly 1,372 shares through his spouse, totaling over 79,000 shares. This exercise is described as a routine compensation-related equity event.

title: Wolverine Asset Mgmt reports 5.18% stake in Solarius (SOCA)
summary: Wolverine Asset Management, LLC and related entities have reported a 5.18% beneficial stake, comprising 915,978 Class A ordinary shares, in Solarius Capital Acquisition Corporation (SOCA). This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating a passive investment. The ownership involves shared voting and dispositive power among WAM, Wolverine Holdings, Christopher L. Gust, and Robert R. Bellick, with Wolverine Flagship Fund Trading Limited holding rights to dividends or sale proceeds.

title: [424B2] CANADIAN IMPERIAL BANK OF COMMERCE /CAN/ Prospectus Supplement
summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CIBC) is offering new capped, leveraged, buffered basket-linked notes tied to five international indices, each with a $1,000 principal amount. These notes offer an upside participation rate of 240% and a 15% buffer against declines, but holders risk losing principal if the final basket level falls below the buffer. The estimated value of the notes on the trade date is between $973.10 and $993.10 per note, and payments are subject to CIBC's credit risk.

title: CIBC (CM) issues GLD-linked ARNs: 300% upside, $12.49 cap
summary: The Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CIBC) is offering 682,488 units of Accelerated Return Notes (ARNs) linked to the SPDR® Gold Shares (GLD), with a principal amount of $10.00 per unit. These notes, maturing in approximately 14 months (June 25, 2027), provide a 300% participation rate for upside potential in GLD, capped at a $12.49 redemption amount per unit, and expose investors to a 1-to-1 downside risk. Key risks include CIBC's credit risk, limited secondary market liquidity, and potential loss of up to 100% of the principal investment.

title: RBC (RY) issues $2.98M Amazon‑linked auto‑callable notes with 10.30% coupon
summary: Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) is offering $2.98 million in Auto-Callable Contingent Coupon Barrier Notes linked to Amazon.com, Inc. common stock, featuring an annualized contingent coupon of 10.30%. These notes offer monthly coupon payments if Amazon's stock meets a 63% Coupon Threshold and can be automatically called starting after six months. Investors face principal loss risk if the notes are not called and Amazon's stock falls below the 63% Barrier Value at maturity, and also bear the issuer’s credit risk.

title: Brookdale Senior Living (BKD) director not seeking re-election in 2026
summary: Brookdale Senior Living Inc. announced that Dr. Jordan R. Asher, a member of its Board of Directors, will not seek re-election at the 2026 annual meeting of stockholders. He will continue his term until it expires at that meeting. The company stated that Asher's decision is not due to any disagreements with Brookdale, its Board, or management regarding operations, policies, or practices.

title: Regional Management (RM) exec sells 1,600 shares at $40
summary: Steven B. Barnette, Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer of Regional Management Corp. (RM), sold 1,600 shares of common stock at $40.00 per share. This open-market sale was executed on April 17, 2026, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on December 1, 2025. Following the transaction, Barnette directly holds 18,346 shares of Regional Management common stock.

title: Abivax (NASDAQ: ABVX) schedules May 11 general meeting in Paris
summary: Abivax (NASDAQ: ABVX) has scheduled its annual ordinary and extraordinary general meeting for May 11, 2026, at 3:00 pm CEST in Paris. The details for the meeting, including the agenda and draft resolutions, were published in the French official legal bulletin on April 3, 2026, and preparatory documents are available on the company's website. This information is also incorporated by reference into Abivax's U.S. registration statements on Form F-3 and Form S-8.

title: Six ship sales put $300M on the way to Scorpio Tankers in Q2
summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE: STNG) announced agreements to sell six 2014-built vessels—three LR2 product tankers and three MR product tankers—for a total of $300 million. The sales are projected to close in Q2 2026. This move aligns with the company's recent focus on balance sheet and fleet optimization, following earlier asset sales and financing activities.

title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. Announces Six Vessel Sale Agreements for $300 Million in Aggregate
summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. has announced agreements to sell six product tankers for a total of $300 million. The sales involve three LR2 product tankers for $195 million and three MR product tankers for $105 million, with closings expected in the second quarter of 2026. The company currently owns 87 product tankers and has newbuilding agreements for additional vessels.

title: ALIT Investor Alert: Alight, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT) naming two former senior officers as individual defendants. The lawsuit alleges that these officers misled investors regarding the company's execution and financial performance, leading to a nearly 90% decline in Alight shares during the class period. Investors who suffered losses may seek to lead the class action, with a deadline to file by May 15, 2026.

title: Paymentus to Report First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results and Host Webcast on May 4, 2026
summary: Paymentus Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PAY) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Monday, May 4, 2026. The company will host a live webcast at 5 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Interested parties can register via the Paymentus website's 'Investor Relations' section or by telephone.

title: Freightos (CRGO) CTO sells 2,517 shares in tax-related RSU sale
summary: Freightos Ltd's Chief Technology Officer, Enric Alventosa Abril, sold 2,517 Ordinary Shares at $1.85 each on April 16, 2026. This sale was a "sale-to-cover" transaction to meet tax liabilities arising from the vesting of restricted share units (RSUs). Following the sale, Abril directly holds 29,650 Ordinary Shares and various stock options with different exercise prices and expiration dates.

title: Tax-cover sales at Freightos (CRGO) reduce CSO share holdings
summary: Freightos Ltd's Chief Strategy Officer, Ian Arroyo, executed routine tax-related share sales on April 16, 2026, to cover liabilities from vesting restricted share units (RSUs). A total of 1,751 ordinary shares were disposed of at $1.85 per share for this purpose. Despite these sales, Arroyo retains significant equity exposure through direct ordinary share holdings and multiple stock option grants.

title: Enhabit Investor Alert: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Enhabit, Inc. - EHAB
summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of Enhabit, Inc. (NYSE: EHAB) to Kinderhook Industries, LLC, concerned that the cash consideration of $13.80 per share may undervalue the company. The law firm is seeking to determine if the price and the process leading to the transaction are adequate and encourages shareholders who believe the offer undervalues their shares to contact them to discuss their legal rights.

title: VITL Investor Alert: Vital Farms, Inc. Securities Fraud
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is investigating Vital Farms, Inc. (VITL) for alleged securities fraud, examining whether the company's risk disclosures regarding an ERP system transition were adequate. The lawsuit claims that Vital Farms used boilerplate language about potential ERP issues even after production slowdowns and shipment delays had already materialized, leading to missed revenue guidance and a stock price decline. Investors who purchased VITL securities between May 8, 2025, and February 26, 2026, may seek to lead the class action.

title: Alcon Inc stock (CH0432492467): Is its eye care dominance strong enough to unlock steady growth?
summary: Alcon Inc. (CH0432492467) is positioned as a leader in the eye care industry, benefiting from surging demand for vision correction and surgical solutions, particularly in aging populations. The company's business model is based on surgical, pharmaceutical, and vision care products, supported by strong R&D and vertical integration. While facing risks like reimbursement cuts and generic pressures, its market leadership and robust pipeline are seen as key drivers for sustained growth, making it a defensive healthcare investment.

title: UPST Investor Alert: Upstart Holdings Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Company Allegedly Misled on AI Growth: Levi & Korsinsky
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST). The lawsuit alleges that Upstart misled investors about the capabilities and impact of its AI model, Model 22, which ultimately suppressed loan approvals despite earlier optimistic projections. Investors who purchased UPST shares between May 14, 2025, and November 4, 2025, may be eligible to recover losses, with a lead plaintiff deadline of June 8, 2026.

title: Columbia Financial reports Q1 net income $13.1M, EPS $0.13; NIM 2.42%
summary: Columbia Financial (CLBK) reported a significant increase in Q1 2026 net income to $13.1 million, or $0.13 EPS, up from $8.9 million, or $0.09 EPS, in Q1 2025. This improvement was driven by higher net interest income and a net interest margin of 2.42%, alongside lower provision for credit losses. The company also announced plans for a second-step conversion and a merger with Northfield Bancorp, while noting modest balance sheet changes and an increase in non-performing loans due to a specific commercial real estate loan.

title: Lower deposit costs lift Columbia Financial profit 47% in Q1
summary: Columbia Financial (NASDAQ: CLBK) reported a significant 47.2% year-over-year increase in net income to $13.1 million ($0.13 EPS) for Q1 2026, driven by higher net interest income and lower provision for credit losses. The company also announced plans for a second-step conversion and a proposed merger with Northfield Bancorp, aiming to expand its market presence and lower its deposit costs. While net interest margin expanded to 2.42%, the quarter saw increased non-interest expenses due to merger-related costs and a slight decrease in total deposits.

title: Columbia Financial (NASDAQ: CLBK) posts higher Q1 2026 earnings and wider net interest margin
summary: Columbia Financial (CLBK) reported stronger Q1 2026 results with net income rising to $13.1 million, or $0.13 per share, from $8.9 million a year earlier, driven by a $10.1 million increase in net interest income and an expanded net interest margin of 2.42%. Despite a rise in non-performing loans to $41.4 million, credit quality remained solid with net recoveries. The company also announced plans for a second-step conversion and a merger with Northfield Bancorp, Inc., pending regulatory and stockholder approvals.

title: Sandstorm Gold Royalties acquired by Royal Gold Inc. for approximately US$3.5 billion
summary: Sandstorm Gold Royalties, a company focused on precious metals streaming and royalties, was acquired by Royal Gold, Inc. for approximately US$3.5 billion. Fasken advised the special committee of Sandstorm Gold Royalties on the acquisition, which was finalized in October 2025. The Fasken team involved Brad Freelan, Zach Austin, and Brad Moore.

title: Royal Gold to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
summary: Royal Gold, Inc. announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after market close. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 12 p.m. Eastern Time, and will be webcast live on the company's website. The company also provided details for accessing the conference call, including dial-in numbers and a webcast URL.

title: Royal Gold to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
summary: Royal Gold, Inc. announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 12:00 PM Eastern Time. Investors can access the webcast and archived call details on the company's website.

title: Alarum Technologies (ALAR) CEO details share, RSU and option stakes
summary: Alarum Technologies CEO Daniel Shachar filed an initial ownership report detailing his holdings in the company. He directly holds 899,988 ordinary shares, including restricted share units vesting through 2026, 2027, and 2028. Shachar also holds stock options for 540,000, 22,500, and 61,527 ordinary shares with various exercise prices and expiration dates between 2030 and 2032, and owns 85,930 American Depositary Receipts (each representing 10 ordinary shares).

title: Bain Capital Specialty Finance (BCSF) outlines 2026 director elections and PwC vote
summary: Bain Capital Specialty Finance (BCSF) will hold its 2026 virtual annual meeting on May 21, 2026. Stockholders are asked to elect three Class I directors—Amy Butte, Thomas A. Hough, and Clare S. Richer—for terms expiring in 2029 and to ratify PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for 2026. The board unanimously recommends voting for both proposals.

title: MEDP Investor Alert: Medpace Holdings Inc. Securities Fraud
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a pending securities class action lawsuit against Medpace Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MEDP), naming senior executives as individual defendants. The lawsuit alleges that Medpace shares fell over 15.9% after corrective disclosures revealed a Q4 2025 book-to-bill ratio of 1.04, significantly lower than the repeatedly projected 1.15. Investors who purchased shares between April 22, 2025, and February 9, 2026, may be eligible to recover losses, with a lead plaintiff deadline set for June 8, 2026.

title: Robbins LLP Urges Investors Who Lost Money Investing in Medpace Holdings Inc. to Contact the Firm for Information About Leading the Class Action Against MEDP
summary: Robbins LLP is urging investors who lost money in Medpace Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MEDP) to contact the firm regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Medpace misled investors by providing an overly optimistic book-to-bill ratio of 1.15 for Q4 2025, while the actual ratio announced on February 9, 2026, was 1.04, leading to a significant stock price drop. Shareholders who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and February 9, 2026, may be eligible to participate and have until June 8, 2026, to file as lead plaintiff.

title: DRVN Investor Alert: Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Securities
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert for Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (DRVN) after the company allegedly concealed financial reporting failures, leading to a significant stock price drop. Institutional investors who held DRVN shares between May 9, 2023, and February 24, 2026, are encouraged to consider lead plaintiff opportunities in the pending securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit claims that Driven Brands issued materially inaccurate financial statements, overstating revenue and cash while understating operating expenses, necessitating a restatement of nearly three years of financial reports.

title: Bancolombia SA stock (US05968L1026): Why mobile-first delivery is suddenly worth a closer look
summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is enhancing how investors receive information on Bancolombia SA stock (US05968L1026) by prioritizing mobile-first content delivery. This update tailors financial insights, such as loan growth, digital banking expansion, and economic shifts in Colombia, directly to users' Google Discover feeds based on their activity. This approach provides retail investors with proactive, timely intelligence on key metrics and market trends for Bancolombia, a major Latin American bank, helping them stay informed in a volatile emerging market.

title: Canada clears ClearPoint brain navigation system for clinical trial sites
summary: ClearPoint Neuro (NASDAQ: CLPT) has received a Medical Device License from Health Canada for its Neuro Navigation System, which supports both MRI-guidance and iCT-guidance workflows. This approval, following an earlier clearance for its SmartFlow Neuro Cannula, allows biopharma partners to conduct clinical trials and commercial operations in Canada using ClearPoint's integrated navigation and therapy-delivery platform. The company aims for this expansion to help achieve its target of 20,000 cell and gene therapy procedures annually and solidify Canada as part of its 34-country regulatory network.

title: Bigger Capital Group (CLPT) files ownership update showing 7.54% attributed to Michael Bigger
summary: Bigger Capital Group has filed an updated Schedule 13G/A for ClearPoint Neuro, Inc. (CLPT), revealing beneficial ownership figures as of April 20, 2026. Bigger Capital beneficially owns 4.54% of the class, while District 2 Capital Fund owns 1.14%. Michael Bigger's aggregated beneficial ownership, including family holdings and an IRA, stands at approximately 7.54% of the company's common stock.

title: Clear Channel Investor Alert: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. - CCO
summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCO) to Mubadala Capital and TWG Global for $2.43 per share. The law firm is examining whether the offered price adequately values the company and if the sales process was fair to shareholders. KSF encourages shareholders who believe the transaction undervalues the company to contact them to discuss their legal rights.

title: BCAX (BCAX) notice: 15,000 shares to be sold after option exercise
summary: Bicara Therapeutics Inc. (BCAX) has filed a Form 144 indicating a proposed sale of 15,000 shares of common stock on April 20, 2026, following the exercise of stock options. The sale is being handled by UBS Financial Services, Inc., and the filing also references previous open-market sales by Claire Mazumdar in March 2026, including a significant transaction of 36,766 shares for over $700,000. Regulators view these as routine supply events with neutral immediate impact, although the full details of holding period compliance are not explicitly stated.

title: Southern Company (SO) Announces Increased Dividend for Shareholders
summary: Southern Company (SO) has announced an increased quarterly dividend of $0.76 per share, marking 25 consecutive years of dividend increases. While this reflects the company's commitment to shareholder value and financial health, its GF Score™ of 82/100 points to strong long-term potential, despite a lower financial strength rating and insider selling activity. Investors are urged to consider both the growth prospects and financial challenges.

title: 1,125-share sale notice by Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) tied to RSU vesting
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 1,125 shares of common stock, valued at $216,000.00, with a transaction date of April 17, 2026. These shares originated from a Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) vesting on May 30, 2024, granted under the company's equity compensation plan. The filing serves as a routine notice of proposed sales by affiliates or insiders and does not confirm the actual execution of the sale.

title: NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) retires $750M 3.875% 2026 senior notes
summary: NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) announced the redemption of its entire US$750 million principal amount of 3.875% senior notes due June 2026, executed by its subsidiaries NXP B.V., NXP USA Inc., and NXP Funding LLC. This move is part of the company's capital allocation strategy, which also includes share repurchases and cash dividends. The redemption reduces NXP's outstanding debt and removes an upcoming maturity, aligning with a disciplined approach to capital management.

title: JPMorgan (NYSE: JPM) sets Initial Value 4,180.83 for capped notes
summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has amended a pricing supplement for its Capped Buffered Equity Notes linked to the MSCI World Index. The amendment sets the Initial Value of the index at 4,180.83, which is the closing level on the Pricing Date. These notes, which are guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., are set to mature on September 30, 2027, and have CUSIP 46660RFW9.

title: Illinois Tool Works stock (US4523081093): Is its diversification model still delivering reliable returns for investors?
summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) maintains a diversified industrial model with over 80 decentralized business units, offering stability in volatile markets through varied end-market exposure. This strategy, coupled with an 80/20 simplification approach and rigorous capital allocation, has positioned ITW as a dividend aristocrat. The article evaluates whether this diversification continues to deliver reliable returns amidst evolving global supply chains, fluctuating input costs, and new competitive pressures.

title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. stock (US46120E6023): Is da Vinci dominance still the real growth moat?
summary: This article examines whether Intuitive Surgical's da Vinci platform can maintain its dominance and premium pricing amidst increasing competition in the robotic surgery market. It outlines the company's "razor-and-blades" business model, its product portfolio, strategic advantages, and the importance of its stock for investors in the United States and English-speaking markets. The piece also discusses analyst views, potential risks, and key factors for investors to monitor.

title: IT Investor Alert: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit -
summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP is encouraging investors who suffered losses in Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) to contact the firm regarding a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner concealed the deterioration of its Research CV growth, which ultimately led to significant stock drops for investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. Shareholders may be entitled to recover damages and must act by May 18, 2026, to potentially serve as lead plaintiff.

title: CenterPoint Energy Inc. stock (US15189T1079): Is its utility resilience strong enough for steady ret
summary: CenterPoint Energy Inc. provides defensive exposure to essential services in key U.S. markets, delivering natural gas and electric services to millions through rate-regulated operations. Its strategy aligns with electrification readiness and grid modernization, ensuring stable cash flows and predictable earnings. Analysts generally view the stock favorably for its defensive qualities, growth potential from electrification, and consistent dividend payouts, making it a suitable option for income-focused investors looking for portfolio stability amidst market volatility.

title: Key facts: Chubb Q1 $15.34B revenue; BPS misses; JPM raises PT to $340
summary: Chubb (CB) reported Q1 revenue of $15.34 billion, a 7.4% year-over-year increase, with net premiums earned meeting estimates. However, the company's book value per share significantly missed analyst expectations. Following the earnings, J.P. Morgan maintained a Neutral rating on Chubb but raised its price target from $330 to $340.

title: Alena Brenner Appointed Builders FirstSource Chief Legal Officer
summary: Builders FirstSource, Inc. announced the appointment of Alena Brenner as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. She will oversee all legal, risk management, government affairs, compliance, corporate social responsibility, and insurance functions for the company. Brenner brings nearly 25 years of legal experience from industries including manufacturing, CPG, and fleet management.

title: Arch Capital Group increases share repurchase authorization by $3 billion
summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. announced a $3 billion increase to its existing share repurchase program, bringing the total available for repurchases to approximately $3.1 billion. title: Managing the cognitive dissonance of long-term investing
summary: This article discusses the cognitive dissonance investors face when trying to time the market in reaction to geopolitical events, contrasting it with the importance of long-term investment decisions. Author Brian Levitt argues that markets are forward-looking and probabilistic, not reactive, and attempting to time them can erode long-term returns. He emphasizes that investment decisions, like life decisions, are best judged over decades rather than short periods, advocating for staying invested through uncertainty.
